title: Jerm's Better Leaves
body:
The "Better Leaves Add-on" is an add-on for my resource pack [A Little Taste of Jerm](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/a-little-taste-of-jerm), the pack retextures the leaves to look a little more realistic, and adds a custom model to them to look a little more bushy. This was originally a part of my main pack, but I decided to remove it and make an add-on for it instead. Hope you enjoy!

The Yellow Birch leaves and Whiter Snowy Spruce Leaves have been removed from this pack and reverted to the Vanilla colors.
If you want the Yellow Birch leaves or the Whiter Snowy Spruce leaves check the links below!



My Youtube Channel
[![Youtube Logo](https://i.imgur.com/xkqWt4B.png)](https://www.youtube.com/jermsyboy)

You may not redistribute the textures/models from this pack without my permission. 

You can see the pack in my latest resource pack update video here: 

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=s-wlslPxJ6A
